zh.lifeSummary: 當Viscomte Hugues II de Châtellerault於1110年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特時，他的父親Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT36歲，母親Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse31歲。他和Dame Alix Alençon de Montgomery至少有4個兒子。他去世於1176年之前在法國。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Viscomte Hugues II de Châtellerault was born in 1110, in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT, was 36 and his mother, Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse, was 31. He had at least 4 sons with Dame Alix Alençon de Montgomery. He died before 1176, in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Viscomte Hugues II de Châtellerault est né en 1110, à Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Dame Alix Alençon de Montgomery. Il est décédé avant 1176, à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Viscomte Hugues II de Châtellerault 1110 in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT 36 und seine Mutter Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse 31. Er hatte mit Dame Alix Alençon de Montgomery mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb vor 1176 in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Viscomte Hugues II de Châtellerault è nato il nel 1110 nel Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Dame Alix Alençon de Montgomery. Morì prima del 1176, nel Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Viscomte Hugues II de Châtelleraultが1110年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンチaテラーアウルトで生まれた時，父Aimery I de CHATELLERAULTは36歳，母Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuseは31歳であった。彼はDame Alix Alençon de Montgomeryとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1176年以前にフランスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Viscomte Hugues II de Châtellerault(이)가 1110년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 cha텔레라트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Dame Alix Alençon de Montgomery(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1176년 이전 프랑스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Viscomte Hugues II de Châtellerault nasceu em 1110, em Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Dame Alix Alençon de Montgomery. Ele faleceu antes 1176, em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Viscomte Hugues II de Châtellerault родился в 1110 г. в местности чaтеллираулт, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse, 31. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Dame Alix Alençon de Montgomery. Он умер перед 1176 г. в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Viscomte Hugues II de Châtellerault nació en 1110, en Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Aimery I de CHATELLERAULT, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Amauberge de l'Isle Bouchard Dangereuse, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Dame Alix Alençon de Montgomery. Murió antes de 1176, en Francia.
